jobs.title: Mobile App Performance Optimization
jobs.description:
I have attached a short screen-capture video that shows exactly what users are experiencing: every time a section is opened on the app, the interface pauses, fetches user data again, and re-renders. On the map screen there is an extra pause while the Google Maps view spins up. This happens on both iOS and Android builds, so the root cause is almost certainly shared code rather than a platform-specific quirk.

The goal is simple—sections should feel instant and the map should appear as smoothly as any native view, without redundant network calls or redraws. You are free to refactor networking,
skills: AndroidApp DevelopmentGoogle Maps APIiOS DevelopmentiPhoneJavaScriptMobile App DevelopmentXcode

jobs.title: Customisable Xero Invoice Template Design
jobs.description:
I’m looking for someone who can create a polished, fully branded invoice template for Xero that I can upload and start using right away. The template has to respect two non-negotiable layout details: the invoice date must display in dd/mm/yyyy format, and there needs to be a dedicated field for state vendor numbers. Beyond that, I want the freedom to keep evolving the document myself—adding or removing fields, tweaking colours, fonts or logos, and rewriting any of the text blocks whenever my terms change.

jobs.title: Police Corruption Interview Documentary Filming
jobs.description:
I am turning a real‐life corruption case—where a patrol officer exposed his own chief for stealing evidence and was then wrongfully fired—into a full documentary. The material is compelling: the whistle-blower has already published a book and stored hours of recorded calls, audio logs, and scanned paperwork in a shared Google Drive. What I now need is filming.

jobs.title: High School Timetable Creation
jobs.description:
I need a full weekly timetable designed for a high-school setting that currently runs grades 1 through 10. Every period will have to accommodate not only the standard core subjects (Math, English, Science and the rest of the regular curriculum) but also the additional classes we offer: Sanskrit, Sports, Aptitude, and Financial Literacy.  

The schedule must ensure there are no teacher or room clashes, keep subject hours balanced across the grades, and remain practical for students who move between specialist spaces such as labs and sports facilities.
